push_result: origin/main matches local main at a06b552ea2783bcfa7be3af6e57a071dec2924ce
local_website_verification_notes: Local static server returned HTTP 200 for http://localhost:8000/research.html.
Runtime sample checks passed for DB1004, EB3024 Resident, EB3022 Resident, EA1267, BR1001, and BR1000.
Browser automation modules were unavailable in this session, so local verification used HTTP fetches and runtime source-selection checks.
production_verification_notes: research.html, config.js, and hunt-research.js on production matched local SHA-256 hashes.
GitHub Pages serves LFS-backed CSV paths as pointer files, as expected.
The hunt research loader rejects Git LFS pointer text and falls back to Cloudflare.
Cloudflare Worker json.uoga.workers.dev was deployed with R2 bucket uoga-data and returns real CSV/GeoJSON content for required runtime files.
Live source-selection simulation selected Cloudflare runtime files for predictive engine, point ladder, and reference data.
unresolved_items: GitHub Pages cannot directly serve LFS-backed runtime CSVs as full content; production depends on the Cloudflare Worker/R2 fallback for those files.
Retention audit still recommends a broader Cloudflare/local-archive cleanup pass for backups and archive files, but no files were deleted in this release.
